name: ghost-nest
description: A lightweight browser runtime for interactive ghost-style characters.

scripts.postbuild: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Copy-Item -LiteralPath ghost-nest.extensions.json -Destination dist/ghost-nest.extensions.json -Force; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path dist/devtools | Out-Null; Copy-Item -LiteralPath src/devtools/layer-part-workflow.api.json -Destination dist/devtools/layer-part-workflow.api.json -Force; Copy-Item -LiteralPath src/devtools/layer-part-workflow.sdxl-inpaint.api.json -Destination dist/devtools/layer-part-workflow.sdxl-inpaint.api.json -Force; Copy-Item -LiteralPath src/devtools/layer-part-workflow.sdxl-general.api.json -Destination dist/devtools/layer-part-workflow.sdxl-general.api.json -Force; Copy-Item -LiteralPath src/devtools/layer-part-workflow.sd15-inpaint.api.json -Destination dist/devtools/layer-part-workflow.sd15-inpaint.api.json -Force"
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run check && npm run build
